SIARD (Software-Independent Archiving of Relational Databases) - 1.0: Version number changed from 2.0 to 1.0 from advice from the Swiss Federal Archives.
Microsoft Office Open XML: Revised binary signature provided by Ross Spencer.
SPSS Output File: Container signature developed.

Acrobat PDF/A - Portable Document Format 1b: Additional signature added in order to avoid misidentifying some PDF/A's which contain 1b conformance declaration as PDF's. Research request by Antonio Dalvit and Erica Betto working in an italian project for documentation/configuration management in ASI srl.
